---
title: "CNV refinition and differential expression between tumour and non-tumour"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r set up}
library(Seurat)
library(qs, "~/R_Library/4.5")
library(fastCNV)
source("~/VisHD/functions.R")
library(fastCNV)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)
library(pals)
library(scDblFinder)
arg = 4


# 4. Define file paths
# Finds all directories matching 'LUT-*' to create a list of samples.
paths <- system("realpath ~/VisHD/LUT-*/", intern = T)

# Select the specific sample directory based on the command line argument
path <- paths[arg]
setwd(path)

```

```{r}

srt_cell <- qread("banksy_srt.qs")
DefaultAssay(srt_cell) <- "SpaNorm"
Dbltest <- scDblFinder(GetAssayData(srt_cell, assay = "Spatial", layer = "counts"), returnType =  "scores", clusters = srt_cell$BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1, dbr.sd = 1)
srt_cell <- AddMetaData(srt_cell, as.data.frame(Dbltest))

CB <- read.csv("CB.csv", sep = ",")
CB$cellid <- as.integer(gsub("cellid_|-1", "", CB$Barcode))
srt_cell$category <- NA
srt_cell$category <- paste("CB", CB$CB[match(srt_cell$cell, CB$cellid)])
srt_cell$category[srt_cell$category == "CB NA"] <- "DT"
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "category")

srt_bin <- qread("bined_ouput/srt_fastCNV.qs")

srt_cell <- transfer_visiumhd_to_cells(
  srt_cell,
  srt_bin,
  annotation_cols = c("cnv_clusters", "cnv_fraction", "K5_cluster")
)
```

# Check doublets
```{r fig.height=3, fig.width=10}
ImageFeaturePlot(srt_cell, "score") + ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "class")
DimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "class", reduction =  "umap") + FeaturePlot(srt_cell, "score", reduction = "umap") + DimPlot(srt_cell)
```
The doublet states spread uneven and concentrate in tumour area. 
Unlike sc data, doublets from a seperate cluster, not sure what does it detected. 
-> keep the doublet idenitity see the influence when cell type specific analysis

# Check CNV cluster results
```{r}
library(infercnv)
infercnvobj <- readRDS("bined_ouput/infercnv_uncluster/run.final.infercnv_obj")
hcl <- infercnvobj@tumor_subclusters$hc[["all_observations"]]
clust_tree <- cutree(hcl, k = 4)
srt_bin$infercnv_hc <- 0
srt_bin$infercnv_hc[names(clust_tree)] <- clust_tree
ImageDimPlot(srt_bin, group.by = "infercnv_hc")
srt_cell <- transfer_visiumhd_to_cells(
  srt_cell,
  srt_bin,
  annotation_cols = c("infercnv_hc")
)
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "infercnv_hc")
```


```{r}
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_clusters", cols = "polychrome")
ImageFeaturePlot(srt_cell, "cnv_fraction") 
DimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_clusters", reduction = "banksy0.2.umap") + FeaturePlot(srt_cell, "cnv_fraction", reduction = "banksy0.2.umap")
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_clusters", cols = "polychrome", split.by = "category")
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "K5_cluster", cols = brewer.set3(10))+DimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "K5_cluster", cols = brewer.set3(10), reduction = "banksy0.2.umap")
g1 <- VlnPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1", "cnv_fraction")+labs(y = "cnv_fraction", x = "BANKSY_clsuter") + NoLegend()
g2 = VlnPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_clusters", "cnv_fraction")+labs(y = "cnv_fraction", x = "cnv_cluster")+ NoLegend()
g3 <- VlnPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "K5_cluster", "cnv_fraction")+labs(y = "cnv_fraction", x = "K5_cluster")+ NoLegend()
g1+g2+g3+plot_layout(ncol = 3)

```
```{r}
df <- FetchData(srt_cell, c("BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1", "K5_cluster", "cnv_fraction", "category"))
df <- df %>% group_by(category,BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1, K5_cluster) %>% summarise(n = n(), avg_cnv = mean(cnv_fraction))

ggplot(df, aes(x = BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1, y = n,  fill = as.factor(K5_cluster))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = as.character(polychrome(12))) +
  #scale_fill_gradient(high =  "#B2182B", low = "#92C5DE" )+
  theme_classic()+
  #geom_text(aes(label = avg_cnv, group = category), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),color = "white")+ # Centers labels inside
  facet_grid(.~category, space = "free", scales = "free")
```

```{r}
tree_data <- CNVTree(srt_bin, values ="calls", cnv_thresh = 0.01, healthyClusters = "6")
```

# Annotate tumour based on cnv fraction 
```{r fig.height=7, fig.width=12}
srt_cell$cnv_cutoff <- binarise_expression(srt_cell$cnv_fraction, plot_out = "png/cnv_fraction_binarisation.png")
```
```{r}
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_cutoff")
df <- FetchData(srt_cell, c("BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1", "K5_cluster","cnv_clusters","cnv_cutoff", "cnv_fraction", "category"))
df <- df %>% group_by(category,BANKSY_0.2_snn_res.1, K5_cluster, cnv_clusters ,cnv_cutoff) %>% summarise(n = n(), avg_cnv = mean(cnv_fraction))

ggplot(df, aes(x = as.factor(cnv_clusters), y = n,  fill = as.factor(cnv_cutoff))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = as.character(polychrome(12))) +
  #scale_fill_gradient(high =  "#B2182B", low = "#92C5DE" )+
  theme_classic()+
  #geom_text(aes(label = avg_cnv, group = category), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),color = "white")+ # Centers labels inside
  facet_grid(.~category, space = "free", scales = "free") +
  labs(fill = "cnv fraction cutoff", x = "cnv cluster")
```

```{r}
srt_cell$tumour_anno <- ifelse(srt_cell$cnv_cutoff == "0"|srt_cell$cnv_clusters == "6"|srt_cell$infercnv_hc == "0", "NoTumour", "Tumour")
srt_cell$tumour_fullanno <- paste(srt_cell$category, srt_cell$tumour_anno)
srt_cell$tumour_full_subclone <- paste("CNVsubclone", srt_cell$cnv_clusters, srt_cell$category, srt_cell$tumour_anno)

ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "tumour_anno", cols = c(  "#E64B35","#4DBBD5"))
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "tumour_anno", split.by = "category", cols = c(  "#E64B35","#4DBBD5"))
ImageDimPlot(srt_cell, group.by = "cnv_clusters",split.by = "tumour_anno",  cols = c("#E64B35", "#4DBBD5", "#00A087", "#3C5488", "#F39B7F", "#8491B4", "#91D1C2", "#DC0000", "#7E6148", "#B09C85"))
```

```{r}
saveRDS(srt_cell@meta.data, "tumour_anno.Rds")
```
